Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Advanced From Aug-29-17 To Aug-15-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-16-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.

The Court confirms that Ms. Dolch understands that the funds coming out of escrow are to be placed in an estate bank account, that regular administration is required and that the estate will be subject to full, proper administration. Ms. Rasch stated that the money already came out of escrow, that Ms. Dolch understands her obligations which is why the bond has been increased, that the one year period has lapsed and that it is too late for anybody to submit a creditor's claim. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with bond set at $378,000.00 (order signed in open Court). Status on close of estate is set for February 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-31-2017 Continued To Aug-16-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Application To Advance Hearing Date
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ritzi Lam for Hirabhai Patel and Nina Patel.
Nancy Rasch for Special Administrator.

The Court stated that the Special Administrator is holding money, and that it can confirm the Spouses 50% interest, but that it can not sign an order bypassing administration. Ms. Rasch stated that they have a settlement, but there is an issue of a creditor's claim and that no one is in place to address it. Ms. Lam stated that one solution is to have Debra Dolch file a petition for probate, that they can then close out escrow, do an accounting and then close out the estate. Ms. Rasch stated that Ms. Dolch is willing to take it on. The Spousal Property Petition is granted in part (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-25-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Continued To Jul-25-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (526 Castenada Ave, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jul-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Debra Dolch.

The sale is for 100% of the property. The Estate holds a 50% interest in the property. The sale was confirmed at $1,190,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed June 8, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Ms. Rasch is to calculate the amount required for the additional bond.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Continued To Jul-25-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Continued To Jul-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Brillant for Petitioner.
Ernest Der for Edward Remedios.

Mr. Brillant stated that written discovery responses are due today, that once they are received he is ready to take depositions from the Respondents, that once the depositions are done he is ready to proceed on the petition and that the plan is still to get mediation completed. Mr. Der stated that he has been trying to move this along, that he provided several dates of Ms. Epstein's availability to Mr. Brillant, that Mr. Brillant needed to think about it, that he then received the deposition notices and that he still is not planning on doing discovery as this is pretty straight forward. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to July 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mediation is to be completed by then. The matter is to either be resolved or the Parties are to meet and confer towards resolution.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Ex Parte Application To Extend Authority Of Spcial Administration To Sell Real Property Subject To Court Confirmation And To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2016 Continued To Feb-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-22-2016 Continued To Jan-31-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: David Brillant for Hirabhai Patel & Nynaben Patel. Ernest Der for and with (objector) Edward Remedios.

The Court stated that this is a spousal property petition, that there is a question of the ownership of the real property and asked if the parties are prepared to argue today. Mr. Brillant stated that they need subpoena the escrow files and the banks regarding the loans. Mr. Der stated that the case-law is clear. The Court stated that it is not entirely clear, that it does not know if the discovery will turn up anything relevant, that it expects it to be done promptly and that there may be objections. Mr. Brillant stated that he can get the subpoena's out this week, that it will take 30 days and that he needs do a notice to consumer. The Petition for Spousal Property was continued to January 31, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that if something is found it will expect that a supplement will be filed no later than January 18, 2017 with a reply filed no later than January 24, 2017. A proposed order is to be submitted prior to the hearing indicating that the parties will be submitting on argument.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Continued To Dec-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for petitioner Edward Remedios; David Brilland (by CourtCall) for objectors Hirabhai and Naynaben Patel.

The Court observed that the issues were to be addressed in the spousal petition, and that the hearing on this petition should be continued to a date after the spousal petition hearing is held. Upon agreement of counsel, the matter was continued to December 12, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Der provided the Court with an order extending the special letters to that hearing date, which was signed.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Continued To Oct-31-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for (petitioner) Edward Remedios. Erica Cooper for (objectors) Harry and Nina Patel.

Ms. Cooper stated that administration is not necessary as everything should pass through the spousal property. Ms. Fox stated that they would like a short continuance as they want the creditor's time to run. Ms. Cooper stated that they need 6 weeks and that based on the petition there is only $8000.00 in assets other than the real property. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to October 31, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Aquino. (Not Reported)
